title: MonoCloud - Authentication Platform for Developers | SSO, Passkeys & Next.js
excerpt: MonoCloud is a secure authentication platform for developers offering passkeys, social login, SSO, MFA, and user management. A modern Auth0 alternative with seamless Next.js, API, and SaaS integration.
content_text: AuthenticationThe login methods your users expectHelp your user feel at home and make sure they get the most secure experience possibleLoginIdentifier & PasswordFamiliar and simple password-based login.Send Magic Linkacme.monocloud.com/linkMagic LinksNo codes, no passwords. Just a simple link.One-Time PasscodesSend one-off codes by email or text.Social ProvidersFriction-free auth with the social providers your users trust.OIDC-certified SSO for access to multiple applicationsCustomizationBrand your login flow with our visual editorPut trust at the heart of your login flows by building your brand into every stepUser ManagementEnd-to-end user managementOne place to see and manage your users, their auth providers, and historyDo more with MonoCloudSecure everything from apps to APIsUser login is just the start. With MonoCloud you can secure and manage every aspect of your application architectureAPI ProtectionBuild your own authentication infrastructure.Global Session ManagementControl and manage end user sessions across all devices.MacOS (Chrome)Last Activity: 15 December 2023Location: New York, USAiOS (Safari)Last Activity: 3 March 2024Location: London, UKLogoutDevice LinkingNo keyboard? No problem.Scan the code to log inAudit-Trail LoggingKeep track of every login from every user.Jan 01 2024, 10:24:10 amAuthorization SuccessJan 04 2024, 03:33:40 pmUser Session ExtendedJan 08 2024, 06:21:42 pmAuthorization SuccessJan 20 2024, 11:31:59 pmToken Issued Success{"user_id": "318c2cfe-7918-4b9409e620579","event": "Token Issued Success","client_name": "shopping_app","grant_type": "authorization_code","location": "New York, US"}Machine to MachineAuthenticate and authorize communication between services and devices.Brute Force ProtectionAutomatically detect and deflect password guessing attacks.Bring Your Own TruststoreEnforce Identity at the Connection LevelPrevent unauthorized access and impersonation. Control who calls your APIs with cryptographically verified client identity - even across zero-trust networksTruststoreEnsure only clients with your approved certificates connect.SettingsEnforce compliance and prevent misconfigured identities.Real-Time Certificate RevocationRevoke compromised credentials instantly across AWS, Google CA, Vault, or any PKI.AWS Private CAGoogle Certificate Authority ServiceHashiCorp VaultOther Online or Offline CABanned CertificatesInstantly revoke access when credentials are compromised.Ban CertificatesThumbprints: A3B1C5E89F47D1023D56F7A9E1A8C4B612345678Reason: Privilege revokedDate: Added 2 days agoLaunching SoonNext-up on the MonoCloud roadmapWhen new authentication methods and requirements become available, MonoCloud will be readyMulti-factor AuthenticationCombine multiple auth methods to tackle evolving security threats.More IntegrationsUse MonoCloud SDKs to add authentication to your applications.More Social ProvidersReach more users faster with an ever growing list of social providers.Custom DomainsBoost user trust by running your auth flow on your own domains.Secure, simple auth for everything. Made by developers for developers.ProductFeaturesDevelopersDocumentationMonoCloudGet Help© 2024 MonoCloud. All rights reserved.

sentences.en: The login methods your users expect

blocks.html_en: Help your user feel at home and make sure they get the most secure experience possible

sentences.en: Help your user feel at home and make sure they get the most secure experience possible
sentences.zh: 帮助您的用户有宾至如归的感觉，并确保他们获得最安全的体验
熟悉且简单的基于密码的登录。

blocks.html_en: No codes, no passwords. Just a simple link.
Send one-off codes by email or text.

sentences.en: Send one-off codes by email or text.
sentences.zh: 通过电子邮件或短信发送一次性代码。

blocks.html_en: Friction-free auth with the social providers your users trust.

sentences.en: Friction-free auth with the social providers your users trust.
sentences.zh: 与用户信任的社交提供商进行无摩擦的身份验证。

blocks.html_en: OIDC-certified SSO for access to multiple applications

sentences.en: OIDC-certified SSO for access to multiple applications
sentences.zh: 经过 OIDC 认证的 SSO，可访问多个应用程序

blocks.html_en: Brand your login flow with our visual editor

sentences.en: Brand your login flow with our visual editor
sentences.zh: 使用我们的可视化编辑器打造您的登录流程品牌

blocks.html_en: Put trust at the heart of your login flows by building your brand into every step

sentences.en: Put trust at the heart of your login flows by building your brand into every step
sentences.zh: 通过在每一步中打造您的品牌，将信任置于登录流程的核心

blocks.html_en: One place to see and manage your users, their auth providers, and history

sentences.en: One place to see and manage your users, their auth providers, and history
sentences.zh: 一个可以查看和管理您的用户、他们的身份验证提供商和历史记录的地方
使用 MonoCloud 做更多事情

sentences.en: Secure everything from apps to APIs
sentences.zh: 保护从应用程序到 API 的所有内容

blocks.html_en: User login is just the start. With MonoCloud you can secure and manage every aspect of your application architecture

sentences.en: User login is just the start.
With MonoCloud you can secure and manage every aspect of your application architecture
sentences.zh: 借助 MonoCloud，您可以保护和管理应用程序架构的各个方面
构建您自己的身份验证基础架构。

blocks.html_en: Control and manage end user sessions across all devices.

sentences.en: Control and manage end user sessions across all devices.
sentences.zh: 控制和管理所有设备上的最终用户会话。

sentences.en: Scan the code to log in

blocks.html_en: Keep track of every login from every user.

sentences.en: Keep track of every login from every user.
sentences.zh: 跟踪每个用户的每次登录。

blocks.html_en: Authenticate and authorize communication between services and devices.

sentences.en: Authenticate and authorize communication between services and devices.
sentences.zh: 对服务和设备之间的通信进行身份验证和授权。

blocks.html_en: Automatically detect and deflect password guessing attacks.

sentences.en: Automatically detect and deflect password guessing attacks.
sentences.zh: 自动检测并转移密码猜测攻击。

sentences.en: Enforce Identity at the Connection Level
sentences.zh: 在连接级别强制执行身份验证

blocks.html_en: Prevent unauthorized access and impersonation. Control who calls your APIs with cryptographically verified client identity - even across zero-trust networks

sentences.zh: 防止未经授权的访问和冒充。

sentences.en: Control who calls your APIs with cryptographically verified client identity - even across zero-trust networks
sentences.zh: 控制谁使用经过加密验证的客户端身份调用您的 API - 即使跨零信任网络

blocks.html_en: Ensure only clients with your approved certificates connect.

sentences.en: Ensure only clients with your approved certificates connect.
sentences.zh: 确保只有具有您批准的证书的客户端才能连接。

sentences.en: Enforce compliance and prevent misconfigured identities.
sentences.zh: 强制合规并防止身份配置错误。

blocks.html_en: Revoke compromised credentials instantly across AWS, Google CA, Vault, or any PKI.

sentences.en: Revoke compromised credentials instantly across AWS, Google CA, Vault, or any PKI.
sentences.zh: 跨 AWS、Google CA、Vault 或任何 PKI 立即撤销受损的凭证。
谷歌证书颁发机构服务

blocks.html_en: Instantly revoke access when credentials are compromised.

sentences.en: Instantly revoke access when credentials are compromised.
sentences.zh: 当凭据遭到泄露时立即撤销访问权限。

blocks.html_en: When new authentication methods and requirements become available, MonoCloud will be ready

sentences.en: When new authentication methods and requirements become available, MonoCloud will be ready
sentences.zh: 当新的身份验证方法和要求可用时，MonoCloud 将做好准备

blocks.html_en: Combine multiple auth methods to tackle evolving security threats.

sentences.en: Combine multiple auth methods to tackle evolving security threats.
sentences.zh: 结合多种身份验证方法来应对不断变化的安全威胁。

blocks.html_en: Use MonoCloud SDKs to add authentication to your applications.

sentences.en: Use MonoCloud SDKs to add authentication to your applications.
sentences.zh: 使用 MonoCloud SDK 向您的应用程序添加身份验证。

blocks.html_en: Reach more users faster with an ever growing list of social providers.

sentences.en: Reach more users faster with an ever growing list of social providers.
sentences.zh: 通过不断增长的社交提供商列表，更快地吸引更多用户。

blocks.html_en: Boost user trust by running your auth flow on your own domains.

sentences.en: Boost user trust by running your auth flow on your own domains.
sentences.zh: 通过在您自己的域上运行身份验证流程来增强用户信任。

blocks.html_en: Secure, simple auth for everything. Made by developers for developers.

sentences.zh: 对一切进行安全、简单的身份验证。
由开发人员为开发人员制作。
